bundleOrchestration.purpose: Define how repository-aware agents load, apply, layer and trace checked-in prompt bundles for the ResearchOps platform.

canonicalSources.rule: Use extracted bundle directories under .agent-operating-model/bundles/ as the canonical bundle source.
Use .agent-operating-model/bundle-registry.json to resolve bundle IDs to canonical directories, prompt specs and prompt bodies.
Do not use docs/devops/ResearchOps-Bundle-Setup.zip, uploaded bundle archives, chat memory or historical trace files as authoritative bundle sources.

bootstrap.rule: Before any repository-affecting response, read AGENTS.md, this orchestration file and the bundle registry.
Resolve every selected bundle to its canonical directory under .agent-operating-model/bundles/.
Do not rely on chat memory, uploaded copies of bundles, archived ZIP files or prior conversation state as the source of truth.
If a selected bundle directory, prompt spec or prompt body cannot be loaded, stop repository-affecting work and report the missing source.

bundleRef.when: Frontend, HTML, CSS, accessibility, forms, components, content design or page design are in scope.
Cloudflare Workers, Pages, Wrangler, bindings, D1, KV, R2, Durable Objects, Queues, Workflows, Workers AI, Vectorize, routes or deployments are in scope.
OpenAI API, OpenAI Platform, Responses API, Structured Outputs, function calling, file search, vector stores, embeddings, Batch API, webhooks, Realtime API or Evals are in scope.
Model Context Protocol, MCP servers or clients, MCP tools, MCP resources, MCP prompts, sampling, roots, elicitation, tool consent, tool contracts or agent-tooling safety are in scope.
Airtable tables, records, linked records, formula filters, comments, schema operations, bases, webhooks or attachments are in scope.
Mural OAuth, workspaces, rooms, murals, widgets, templates, tags, comments, exports, users, timers, voting or private mode are in scope.

precedence.rule: GitHub Diamond governs repository safety, commits, branches, pull requests and CI.
ResearchOps Developer Control governs platform architecture and repository-specific implementation.
Multi-Functional Team governs government product, service, ethics and multidisciplinary assurance defaults.
GOV.UK Design System governs GOV.UK UI, accessibility, interaction patterns and content patterns.
Cloudflare governs Cloudflare runtime, deployment, binding and platform-product implementation details.
OpenAI Platform governs OpenAI API, model, tool, retrieval, structured output, eval and AI-safety implementation details.
MCP Agent Tooling governs MCP protocol, tool, resource, prompt, consent and agent-tooling safety implementation details.
Platform API bundles govern API-specific implementation details where their domain is in scope.
When bundles conflict, record the conflict, apply the highest-precedence relevant rule and explain the impact.

traceability.rule: When [reasoning] is present, create an auditable trace.
The trace must record operating-model files loaded, canonical bundle directories selected, bundles skipped, conflicts found and precedence decisions.
The trace must not expose private chain-of-thought.
